query: SELECT cu.tenantId, t.name as tenantName, cu.email, cu.name, cu.status FROM crm_users cu JOIN tenants t ON cu.tenantId = t.id WHERE cu.email = 'bruno@entur.com.br' ORDER BY cu.tenantId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT cu.tenantId, t.name as tenantName, cu.email, cu.name, cu.status FROM crm_users cu JOIN tenants t ON cu.tenantId = t.id WHERE cu.email = 'bruno@entur.com.br' ORDER BY cu.tenantId;
